system.notes:
Luna-certified lander able to take off and land on Luna or any body no larger than Luna; cannot land on Earth.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.31): Luna Lander · 50 · 2 · 6 · Chemical · 8 · Batteries, Fuel Cell · 50% · 2 · 15m3 · 1 · 3 · 2 · 5 · 3 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 50 million eb; Crew 2; Passengers 6; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 8; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell; Sensors 50%; Computers 2; Cargo 15m3; Actions 1; Weapon Spaces 3; Armor (max SP) 2; Damage Points 5; Overkill Points 3; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
